title: Security: WebGL - Use After Free in Buffer11::updateBufferStorage()
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
	Steps to reproduce:  
	  
	1. Open UAF_updateBufferStorage_Repro.html in  Chrome browser.  
	2. Chrome crashes  in rx::Buffer11::updateBufferStorage caused by a Use After Free.  
  
		==23588==ERROR: AddressSanitizer: heap-use-after-free on address 0x22c337f0 at pc 0
